title: VayuDrishti Replay Index (per city)
description: Per-city index of available replay dates (spec 8, 11). Published at web/public/data/{city}/replay/index.json. Each date dir holds nowcast.json + forecast.json with the SAME shapes as the live files, built from OUT-OF-FOLD predictions only. Nov-2025 Delhi window is the demo, works offline.

dates.description: Available replay dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Each has replay/{date}/nowcast.json + forecast.json.
